annotations.label: 8 is composite, not prime nor semiprime

anchor.snippet: 8 is a composite number and the first number which is neither prime nor semiprime
it is the only nonzero perfect power that is one less than another perfect power
8 is the first proper Leyland number of the form
8 is a Fibonacci number and the only nontrivial Fibonacci number that is a perfect cube
Sphenic numbers always have exactly eight divisors
8 is the base of the octal number system
A polygon with eight sides is an octagon
A regular octagon can fill a plane-vertex with a regular triangle and a regular icositetragon
The Ammann–Beenker tiling is a nonperiodic tesselation of prototiles
An octahedron is a regular polyhedron with eight equilateral triangles as faces
The stella octangula , or eight-pointed star , is the only stellation with octahedral symmetry
The cuboctahedron , on the other hand, is a rectified cube or rectified octahedron
The octonions are a hypercomplex normed division algebra that are an extension of the complex numbers

annotations.label: Octonions as double cover of SO(8)

anchor.snippet: They are a double cover of special orthogonal group SO(8)
has an eight-dimensional adjoint representation whose colors are ascribed gauge symmetries
Clifford algebras display a periodicity of 8
The Lie group E 8 has rank 8, and is one of 5 exceptional Lie groups

annotations.label: Smallest non-abelian group with all normal subgroups

anchor.snippet: The order of the smallest non-abelian group whose subgroups are all normal is 8
The Bott periodicity theorem describes the eightfold periodicity of the homotopy groups
